D-001.summary: Use Postgres-backed monolith; defer service split until 3 distinct read patterns emerge

D-002.summary: Adopt Hono on Bun for the API layer (provisional; reversed in P3)

D-003.summary: TypeScript everywhere, strict mode, NodeNext modules; no JS in src/

D-004.summary: Monorepo (pnpm workspaces) with packages api, dashboard, sdk-js, sdk-python, infra

D-005.summary: Defer hiring 2nd engineer until April; founders cover the workload through architecture phase

D-006.summary: Postgres 17 on AWS RDS Aurora Serverless v2

D-007.summary: Pursue PCI Level 4 self-attestation only; outsource Level 1 work to processor (Adyen)

D-008.summary: Weekly all-hands Wed 10am PST; async standup via Slack thread; no daily sync meeting

D-009.summary: Use Lucia for auth (build, not buy); revisit at 1k MAU

D-010.summary: Use Persona for KYC ($1.50/verification); buy, not build

D-011.summary: Sign LOI with ChairSync (dental SaaS, ~80 practices, ~$2K MRR potential)

D-012.summary: Sign LOI with FitFlow (gym CRM, ~30 boutique gyms, ~$900 MRR potential)

D-013.summary: Decline FitFlow custom card-on-file holds — out of scope for v1

D-014.summary: Webhook system v1: HMAC-SHA256 signed payloads; deterministic retry budget capped at 5 attempts

D-015.summary: Burn rate Feb projected $87K/mo; runway 28 months at current spend

D-016.summary: Dashboard MVP scope locked: payment list, customer list, refund flow, webhook log viewer

D-017.summary: Webhook idempotency: Stripe-compatible Idempotency-Key header, 24h dedupe window

D-018.summary: Mar 12 Bun runtime crash under sustained load; sandbox blocked ~6 hours

D-019.summary: D-002 reversed: drop Bun, switch to Node 22 LTS; Devon owned migration over 4 days

D-020.summary: ChairSync starts sandbox testing Mar 8; first bug Mar 9 (typo in error msg), fixed Mar 10

D-021.summary: Begin SOC 2 Type 1 prep parallel with PCI; aim audit-ready by August

D-022.summary: Database migrations via pgroll (zero-downtime); reviewed knex, drizzle-kit native

D-023.summary: Defer multi-currency support to Q3 backlog; v1 is USD-only

D-024.summary: Mar 24 sandbox S3 leak: payment records exposed for ~14h via misconfigured bucket policy

D-025.summary: All infra changes through Terraform; no console access for production after Apr 1

D-026.summary: Add canary alerts on S3 bucket policy changes; Jordan owned implementation (~4 days)

D-027.summary: Pricing model debate begins: % TPV + platform fee vs flat per-tx vs revenue-share

D-028.summary: Dashboard MVP shipped Mar 27 to ChairSync sandbox; mobile webhook viewer redesigned in 2 days

D-029.summary: Devon proposes hiring 2nd SRE; rejected; D-005 stands; Jordan covers solo through April

D-030.summary: State money-transmitter strategy: register as agent of processor (Adyen) for first 6 months

D-031.summary: PCI Level 4 self-attestation submitted Apr 4; approved Apr 9

D-032.summary: D-027 resolved: tiered % (0.5/0.4/0.3) + $99/mo platform fee; no rev-share, no per-tx fixed

D-033.summary: FitFlow goes to sandbox Apr 7; first webhook integration test Apr 9 (worked first try)

D-034.summary: Observability stack: Grafana Cloud (logs+metrics) + Sentry (errors); over self-hosted Prometheus

D-035.summary: Add fraud-flag field to webhook events as P0 ask from FitFlow; 2-day turnaround

D-036.summary: Riley contract extended through May 31 (originally Mar 31)

D-037.summary: Q2 OKRs: GA launch, 5 paying customers by end of June, 99.5% sandbox uptime

D-038.summary: Apr 18 sandbox webhook storm: ~18,000 webhook calls in 4 minutes during ChairSync load test

D-039.summary: D-014 amended: per-tenant retry budget 5/min; global circuit breaker at 1k/sec

D-040.summary: D-038 postmortem surfaces lack of synthetic load testing in CI; added to Q2 backlog

D-041.summary: Launch checklist locked Apr 22; 23 items, owners assigned, daily standups Mon-Fri until Apr 29

D-042.summary: ChairSync agrees to be launch-day reference customer; quote drafted with their CTO

D-043.summary: Final security review by Nico Apr 24; no blockers; 90-day API token rotation cadence post-launch

D-044.summary: Q2 board update: $98K April burn (D-024 remediation); runway revised to 26 months

D-045.summary: Final pre-launch retro Apr 26: Sarah credits scope discipline to D-005; Jordan flags burnout

D-046.summary: Decision NOT to run prod load test before launch; Devon dissented and dissent logged

D-047.summary: Public docs site goes live Apr 28: placeholder + API reference; full guides post-launch

D-048.summary: Public-launch announcement copy locked Apr 27; Alex final sign-off; Marcus reviewed

D-049.summary: Open second engineer req post-launch; defer specific person; plan to interview May

D-050.summary: Add OpenTelemetry spans on every API endpoint as last-mile change before launch
